About Me

From Code to Creativity - Building the Future

I'm Sarthak, a passionate computer science student at SRM Institute of Science & Technology with a keen interest in AI/ML and full-stack development. Currently maintaining an 8.9 CGPA while gaining hands-on experience through internships and impactful projects.

My journey spans from developing lightning-fast image search tools at ProcMart India to creating dynamic web applications at Brainwave Matrix Solutions. I believe in combining technical excellence with creative problem-solving to build solutions that truly make a difference.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me designing graphics for Github Community SRM, participating in hackathons like Smart India Hackathon and JP Morgan Code For Good, or playing football with friends.

AI/ML Expertise

Computer vision, NLP, and machine learning with real-world applications like lightning-fast image search and legal document analysis.

Full-Stack Development

Modern web applications using React, Node.js, and JavaScript with focus on user experience and scalable architecture.

Data Structures & Algorithms

Strong foundation in DSA with problem-solving skills, contributing to efficient and optimized code solutions.

Creative Design

Graphic design and multimedia production using Figma, Photoshop, and Premiere Pro for impactful visual communication.

); }; export default About;
